name: web-ux-testing-agent
description: Cross-agent plugin for defining, executing, debugging, and reporting Playwright-based web UX validation plans. Playwright CLI is the primary runner; Playwright MCP is used for discovery and failure investigation.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, run, debug, and report Playwright web UX validation tests across Codex, Claude, and Copilot.
interface.longDescription: A cross-agent plugin that turns step-by-step UX workflows into structured, human-readable test plans, generates deterministic Playwright CLI tests, executes them, collects artifacts, and produces readable reports. Playwright CLI is the primary execution engine; Playwright MCP is reserved for discovery, live inspection, selector generation, and failure investigation. Ships planner/runner/debugger/reporter subagents, reusable skills, JSON Schemas, an MCP App for editing plans and viewing reports, and a local web UI fallback.
defaultPrompt: Turn this step-by-step workflow into a web UX test plan.
Generate and run the Playwright CLI test for plan create-page.
Investigate why the create-page test failed and suggest a plan repair.
